text: There is ongoing community discussion comparing Hyperliquid ($HYPE) and Solana ($SOL) perpetuals, with arguments that Hyperliquid currently houses the strongest retail flow and product iteration, challenging Solana's perceived retail user advantage in perpetual trading.
author: elfa_2042627429533990946

text: Grayscale is considering adding $HYPE among other digital assets for future investment products, signaling institutional interest and potential increased adoption.
author: elfa_2042674673239101495

text: Hyperliquid supports cross-chain transfers from all supported chains and tokens into stables on HyperCore, enabling faster trading and interoperability across multiple blockchains.
author: elfa_2042679818102129021

text: Hyperliquid's perpetual futures open interest increased by 16% month-over-month in March 2026, contrasting with declines on other venues, indicating growing market activity and liquidity on the platform.
author: elfa_2042611193337024725

text: Hyperliquid's $HYPE token has outperformed major cryptocurrencies year-to-date, with a 62% increase while others declined. The token's price is supported by 99% of protocol revenue being used for buybacks, creating direct token demand and a unique yield mechanism.
author: elfa_2042569105346044293

text: Vibe Trading is partnering with Hyperliquid to deploy an OTC infrastructure and permissionless futures market engine on HyperEVM, integrating with HIP-3 deployments. This aims to create a layered market structure combining OTC discovery with Hyperliquid's order-book liquidity, improving market creation, risk management, and retail user experience.
author: elfa_2042550602329112848

text: The HIP-3 protocol update introduces a market maker feature allowing payment of up to 20bps in HYPE tokens from undelegated staking balances for priority grouping of IOC orders with cancel prioritization, enhancing order execution efficiency.
author: elfa_2042567129719812219

text: Hyperliquid operates a deflationary token model where daily buybacks exceed token rewards, resulting in net permanent removal of HYPE tokens from circulation. This buyback mechanism is price-sensitive and stabilizes supply pressure, creating a flywheel effect as increased adoption leads to higher trading activity and larger buybacks.
author: elfa_2042480542009246153

text: Hyperliquid's trading platform shows significant growth, generating $50 million in revenue and $212 billion in perpetuals trading volume last month, with positive inflows into HYPE ETFs. The platform's market share has increased from 3.5% to around 7% of total exchange trading volume within a year, driven notably by oil and commodities trading.
author: elfa_2042660491995087037

text: Bitwise is preparing to launch a Hyperliquid ETF with ticker $BHYP and a 67bps fee, signaling imminent market entry. The $HYPE token has surged 200% in the past year, reflecting strong investor interest.

text: Highlight clip CZ: Miss one of blockchain or AI, and the country is at a severe disadvantage Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) said in an April 9 interview with Scott Melker that the internet, blockchain, and AI are the three most important industries of recent decades, and any country that misses one will be at a disadvantage. He added that the previous U.S. administration's direction "would have cost it the entire crypto industry."CZ said that President Donald Trump's pardon of him shows the U.S. could see a 180° shift in its stance on crypto. He noted that while the U.S. is currently ahead in crypto regulation, it has still missed some top players and liquidity.He added that the U.S. has a strong ability to self-correct, and is likely to continue improving and making progress. — link
